description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal, light-colored suit with a collared shirt underneath, exuding a sophisticated urban style. The suit jacket is tailored and slightly oversized, with the sleeves rolled up to the elbows, revealing the shirt cuffs. The shirt underneath is open at the collar, adding a relaxed yet stylish touch to the ensemble. The pants are straight-legged and match the jacket, while the shoes are formal and dark, complementing the outfit. The figure's facial features are well-defined, and the hair is short and neatly styled. The overall appearance suggests a confident, well-groomed individual suitable for business or upscale social settings in an urban environment.
description: A well-dressed adult male in a tailored light suit with a collared shirt and formal shoes, exuding urban sophistication.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit, open-collared shirt, and facial features with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the rolled-up sleeves.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit jacket and pants, with the hair's neat styling visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the suit's side profile and the figure's posture.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tailored pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
